_publications._publicationTitle: Analysis of muscle tissue in vivo using fiber-optic autofluorescence and diffuse reflectance spectroscopy.

_contextSnippet: The cardiac muscle was well separable from all skeletal muscles in both AF and DR analyses (AUC = 1 for AF and DR, respectively)
details: AF and DR spectroscopy enabled classification of different muscle types with cardiac muscle well separable from skeletal muscles (AUC=1 for both AF and DR)
